articles.title: Cardano Surpasses $DOGE’s Market Cap as $ADA Recovers From Its Second-Largest Drawdown
articles.description: The total market capitalization of smart contract platform Cardano ($ADA) has surpassed that of popular meme-inspired cryptocurrency Dogecoin ($DOGE), at a time in which $ADA has been recovering from its second-largest drawdown ever.
